table.partialInvalid: Invalid partial amount (0 or greater than entry amount).

errors.missingPrimaryBook: No active primary accounting book is configured for this organization.
errors.multiplePrimaryBooks: More than one active primary accounting book is configured. Keep only one primary book active.
errors.missingBankMapping: This bank account is not mapped to a ledger account in the active primary accounting book. Configure it in Accounting > Bank mappings before settling.
errors.multipleBankMappings: This bank account has more than one active ledger mapping for the primary accounting book. Keep only one active mapping.
errors.invalidBankLedgerAccount: The mapped bank ledger account is invalid.
errors.missingCategory: This entry has no cashflow category. Assign a category before settling.
errors.missingPostingPolicy: This entry category has no active settlement posting policy for the primary accounting book. Configure settlement debit and credit accounts before settling.
errors.multiplePostingPolicies: This entry category has more than one active settlement posting policy for the primary accounting book. Keep only one active policy.
errors.invalidDebitAccount: The settlement debit account configured for this category is invalid.
errors.invalidCreditAccount: The settlement credit account configured for this category is invalid.
errors.invalidTxType: This entry has an invalid transaction type.
errors.sameTransferBank: The source and destination bank accounts must be different for a transfer.
